visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women with long dark hair stand in the middle of a spacious warehouse aisle. The woman on the left wears a brown jacket over a patterned cream skirt, while the woman on the right wears a white bucket hat with a logo and a white collared dress. They are both holding folded fabric bundles featuring cartoon characters. The background shows towering metal shelves filled with cardboard boxes and various merchandise under bright industrial lights. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of a pallet containing several stacks of yellow folded blankets. Each blanket is tied with a white ribbon and features various printed facial expressions of a cartoon beagle. The cardboard packaging surrounding the blankets indicates the brand Peanuts and Decorative Throw. (3) Back to the two women, they are now holding up four different colored blankets: light blue, forest green, white, and yellow. They smile brightly at the camera, shifting the blankets to show the patterns. Large red and blue branding text is overlaid at the top of the frame. (4) A tighter shot focuses on the green and blue blankets. The woman on the left points to the green blanket, which features an illustration of a character sitting in a garden. The woman on the right holds the yellow one. They appear to be comparing and discussing the aesthetic qualities of the different options. (5) The two women stand together again, holding all four blanket options stacked or side-by-side. They gesture enthusiastically toward the products. Several vibrant yellow text bubbles with black outlines pop up around them, emphasizing specific promotional points. The lighting remains bright and even throughout the warehouse setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 前陣子. (3) [Variety]: 賣到缺貨的史努比毯毯終於補貨了. (4) [Subtitle]: 終於補貨了. (5) [Variety]: 四色都有. [Subtitle]: 而且這次四色都有. (6) [Subtitle]: 有黃色 白色 綠色跟藍色. (7) [Subtitle]: 我第一次看這兩個超美的. (8) [Subtitle]: 看這兩個顏色 好好看喔. (9) [Variety]: 推薦綠色. [Subtitle]: 推薦綠色 趁秋天適合秋冬. (10) [Subtitle]: 而且綠色跟藍色. (11) [Variety]: 算是稀有款. [Subtitle]: 算是稀有款 所以要的話拿這兩個. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後經典的黃色當然超好看. (13) [Subtitle]: 這次補超多 尤其黃色很多. (14) [Subtitle]: 359元是雙人的毯毯. (15) [Variety]: 非常推薦入手. [Subtitle]: 非常推薦入手. (16) [Subtitle]: 再慢可能又要沒有囉.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators appearing together in a retail environment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two women: one in a brown jacket and patterned skirt; another in a white bucket hat and white dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse interior featuring high storage racks, stacked merchandise, and industrial overhead lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks quickly in Mandarin, announcing that a previously sold-out item is finally back in stock. Background music consists of a high-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track with a strong, rhythmic beat. The acoustic environment sounds like a large, open indoor space with a slight reverb, but the voice remains clear and centered in the mix. (2) A second female voice, also with a high pitch but slightly softer tone, chimes in to express excitement about the colors available. The two voices overlap briefly in a friendly, conversational manner. The BGM maintains a steady energy level, providing a cheerful bed for the dialogue. There are no significant sound effects or background noises, suggesting a relatively quiet recording environment or effective noise suppression. (3) The primary female speaker continues by describing the specific colors and recommending the green and blue ones as rare finds. Her speech rate is brisk and enthusiastic, with frequent upward inflections. The BGM continues with its bright, synthesized melody and consistent percussion. The overall volume of the music is well-balanced, sitting just below the vocals. (4) The speaker mentions the price of 359 dollars and describes the blankets as being for two people. Her voice carries a persuasive and encouraging tone. The music builds slightly in energy as she delivers the final call to action, warning viewers to hurry before they sell out again. The track ends with a clean cut as the voices finish speaking.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence -> Feature Breakdown -> Price Info -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about the restock of popular Snoopy-themed blankets at Costco. It highlights the availability of four different colors, offers styling recommendations, provides specific pricing, and creates urgency by mentioning the likelihood of selling out again.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand logo, specific pricing information, and verbal recommendation to purchase the product at a specific retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social media style 'finds' video targeting bargain hunters and fans of the Peanuts franchise.
